reviews.review_description: I've had a couple of fun experiences in this game, the people were nice and the game was simple and fun. I really do miss this era of Vr games even though it contributed to the meta hate it was still a fun time to be around
This used to be such a great game but now the lobbies are empty and the game is dead:(

Finally cat mania is back (technically) 🙏🙏 this is the best news of my life, i loved the old game so much like bro i would hop on this game every day like 2 years ago so when i found out another cat mania game is coming out i was so happy (im on the toilet rn i just found this out)
I LOV IT ITS SO SILLY AND UNDERRATED (the cat head are kinda scry tho..) would spend money on it but I'm scared it won't go threw 😔‼️
I loved this game and miss it so much, I hope a new version of it comes out sometime..
Even when it's closed. I can still remember it

Even though i haven't played in a while, i remember this game being fun however some game modes do last a while due to people hiding but once those are over its fine. This is a very fun game and it's basically just vr fall guys with cats which makes it fun. 10/10 game would play again. (It's also good for weight loss because if you want to win you have to sweat really badly lol) -Noah O_O
It sucks

Here are some ideas for a Cat Mania VR game:

1. Cat Cafe: Create a virtual reality cat cafe where players can interact with cats in a cozy cafe setting. They can play with the cats, feed them, and even adopt one to take home!

2. Cat Show: Host a virtual cat show where players can enter their own cats or watch other players' cats compete in various categories such as cuteness, agility, and obedience.

3. Cat Adventure: Create a virtual world where players can explore and complete challenges with their cats. They can climb trees, chase mice, and even navigate through an obstacle course.

4. Cat Training: Create a virtual reality cat training simulation where players can teach their cats new tricks such as jumping, rolling over, and playing fetch.

5. Cat Rescue: Create a virtual reality game where players are tasked with rescuing cats from dangerous situations such as being stuck in trees or trapped in a building. Players must use their skills to safely rescue the cats and bring them to safety.

I hope these ideas are helpful! Let me know if you have any other questions or if there's anything else I can assist you with.

Do not play robo run it will steal your ip, if you look at the metadata for robo run it has a ip grabber. For you're saftey, please do not listen to them or do anything they say. and also stop spaming are reviews and get a life and https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/3d/props/hypepoly-battle-royale-show-197766 this ur map 💀 and you say we are stealing from your game? LMAO. Your game doesn't even have functioning fall guys type game it's just a map because you can't code it. You needed to search up a tutorial on how to make a teleporter, your a shell of a man.

reviews.review_description:
This game, whilst being heavily inspired by goriila tag originally, is actually better than one might think.
You get your occasional bugs here and there, but only 3 people are working on this, plus, it's still in alpha/beta.
So here are some pros and cons:

Pros:

- easy controls

- a somewhat nice community

- very nice developers

- cool visuals

- lots of updates

Cons:

- filled mostly with children

- crashes a lot

- a lot of physical excersize (if you don't like that)

- no open world area (at the moment)


If you want to get an opinion on the game yourself, though. Just play it! It's free & there are no in-app purchases. Things ARE due to change, so I'm excited what else they have to add!

developer_response.body: Don't Worry! New update expected by January 1st!
